page_title: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜 COMPLETE FILE
text:
is a guidebook for CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜 by Byakuya-Shobo CO.,LTD. released on 14 May 2009.

Overview

The book is a guidebook for the CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜 pachinko machine.

Table of Contents

Staff

Strategy Writer: サードパーティー, 坂良井健
Cover Design: 1LDK.inc
Inner Design: Cogito Graphics
Photographer: 古瀬友博
Planning & Editing: 古杉実, 酒井大輔, 福田祐二, 長井優毅, 前川原克仁, パチンコ必勝ガイド編集部
Editor: 成澤浩一
Publisher: 末井昭
Publisher: Byakuya-Shobo CO.,LTD.
Printing: 大日本印刷株式会社
Production Cooperation: Gainax Co. Ltd., FIELDS Co., Ltd.

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 
ISBN-13: ISBN
